description_long: This is a formal, structured hat with an octagonal, flat-topped crown covered in deep red fabric, adorned with an intricate gold embroidered pattern. The sides of the crown are wrapped in black material, bordered at the top and bottom by beige or gold trim, giving the hat a distinguished, ceremonial appearance. A gold decorative emblem is centered on the front, and a gold cord with button-like ends encircles the lower part of the crown, adding to its ornate style. The brim is short, flat, and black, extending slightly from the front, typical of a peaked cap. The overall construction suggests a hat used for official or ceremonial purposes, such as a military or band uniform. The materials appear to be a combination of fabric, possibly wool or felt, with metallic thread and decorative elements.
description: A formal, octagonal peaked cap with a red embroidered top, black sides, gold trim, and a short black brim. Ornate gold decorations and a cord accentuate its ceremonial style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gold emblem, cord, and the short black brim beneath the red embroidered crown.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the gold cord wrapping around the hat and the flat, extended black brim.
description_view_2: Top-down view displaying the full gold embroidered pattern on the red crown and the octagonal shape.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the gold cord and brim visible, but without the front emblem.
